assetFormat: classic CODE-ISSUER (dash). BOTH dash CODE-ISSUER and colon CODE:ISSUER (URL-encoded %3A) were tested LIVE against the server and both returned HTTP 200 status:success; the server echoes the asset back normalized to dash format in either case. XLM is passed as the literal 'XLM'. The SAC C... addresses are NOT used by this source.
amountFormat: human/decimal units as a string, NOT stroops. sellingAmount=1000 means 1000.0000000 BLND. The server parses it with parseFloat. Response amounts (directTrade.buying, estimatedBuyingAmount, sellingAmount) are likewise decimal strings in human units.
notes: Endpoint and exact param names confirmed from the official SDK @stellar-broker/client@0.6.14 estimateSwap() (src/estimate.js) which builds GET (origin||'https://api.stellar.broker')+'/quote?'+query. Param names: sellingAsset, buyingAsset, sellingAmount, slippageTolerance (validateQuoteRequest in src/quote-request.js). No partnerKey/auth required for /quote (the estimate endpoint); partnerKey is only for the /ws WebSocket trading session. slippageTolerance is a decimal fraction (0.005 = 0.5%), default 0.02, max 0.5.
